description: Keyword, vector, hybrid, and SQL retrieval over data on object storage, for AI agents.
name: io.github.infino-ai/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Data to serve: a local path or an s3://|az:// bucket URI. Optional — defaults to a durable per-user directory (~/.infino/mcp) so data persists across restarts, falling back to an ephemeral memory:// catalog only if that directory can't be created.
environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_URI

environmentVariables.description: Set (1/true/yes) to expose add/update/delete tools and allow DDL/DML through SQL. Read-only when unset.
environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_ENABLE_WRITES

environmentVariables.description: Hugging Face feature-extraction model for local embedding (default Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384-dim).
environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_EMBED_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Set (1/true/yes) to probe the object store at startup, so bad credentials or an unreachable bucket fail then instead of on the first search.
environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_VALIDATE
